message:
Rename mount e2e test file path

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/xalzqzyh7fbbwyzbf6qcb1rh

files.patch:
@@ -79,7 +79,7 @@ jobs:
         if: matrix.runtime == 'node'
         run: |
           set -euo pipefail
-          node tests/node-mount-test.ts > /tmp/openfuse-node-e2e.log 2>&1 &
+          node tests/mount.e2e.ts > /tmp/openfuse-node-e2e.log 2>&1 &
           pid=$!
           deadline=$((SECONDS + 120))
           while kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; do
@@ -98,4 +98,4 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Run e2e mount test (Bun)
         if: matrix.runtime == 'bun'
-        run: timeout 120s bun tests/node-mount-test.ts
+        run: timeout 120s bun tests/mount.e2e.ts

@@ -27,4 +27,4 @@ RUN cd packages/@openfuse/fuse && \
     cc -shared -o src/bridge/fuse_bridge.so src/bridge/fuse_bridge.c \
     $(pkg-config --cflags --libs fuse) -fPIC -pthread
 
-CMD ["node", "tests/node-mount-test.ts"]
+CMD ["node", "tests/mount.e2e.ts"]

@@ -106,10 +106,10 @@ bun test packages/openfuse/test/core.test.ts
 bun run build
 
 # Run Linux mount e2e script (Node.js 22+, requires FUSE)
-node tests/node-mount-test.ts
+node tests/mount.e2e.ts
 
 # Run Linux mount e2e script (Bun runtime, requires FUSE + compiled bridge)
-bun tests/node-mount-test.ts
+bun tests/mount.e2e.ts
 ```
 
 ## Docker Linux Test Setup
@@ -122,7 +122,7 @@ docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up --build
 
 GitHub Actions runs:
 - Unit tests with `bun test` on Ubuntu + macOS
-- Linux mount e2e script on Node + Bun as experimental checks (`tests/node-mount-test.ts`)
+- Linux mount e2e script on Node + Bun as experimental checks (`tests/mount.e2e.ts`)
 
 ## License

@@ -9,9 +9,9 @@
   "scripts": {
     "build": "bun run --workspaces build",
     "test:unit": "bun test packages/openfuse/test/core.test.ts",
-    "test:e2e": "node tests/node-mount-test.ts",
-    "test:e2e:node": "node tests/node-mount-test.ts",
-    "test:e2e:bun": "bun tests/node-mount-test.ts",
+    "test:e2e": "node tests/mount.e2e.ts",
+    "test:e2e:node": "node tests/mount.e2e.ts",
+    "test:e2e:bun": "bun tests/mount.e2e.ts",
     "test": "bun test"
   },
   "devDependencies": {
